channel.title: Analytics on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Analytics on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Plausible Analytics vs Umami: Best Open Source Google Analytics Alternative in 2026
item.description: Looking for a privacy-friendly Google Analytics alternative you can self-host in 2026? You’re not alone. Thousands of website owners are ditching GA4 for lightweight, cookie-free analytics tools that respect visitor privacy while still delivering actionable insights.
